issues.title: Mobile button hit areas drop below 44px at narrow breakpoints
issues.evidence: Before fix controls were 40/36/34px in <=430/<=360/<=320; this cycle normalizes to 44px.
issues.root_cause: Narrow-breakpoint overrides in 04-header.css violate target size standard.

issues.title: Search/menu/cart overlay logic branches by <1025 while CSS mobile mode is <=1023
issues.evidence: Before fix JS used window.innerWidth < 1025 in overlay control while CSS switched at 1023/1024; this cycle aligns JS to 1024.
issues.root_cause: Breakpoint contract mismatch between JS and CSS.

issues.title: Promo height and shrink behavior initialized in deferred phase
issues.evidence: Before fix promo/shrink sync depended on deferred path; this cycle moves first sync to runCritical and keeps deferred as guarded fallback.
issues.root_cause: First-open behavior depended on requestIdleCallback timing.

issues.title: Cart trigger is visually taller than sibling controls
issues.evidence: Before fix cart trigger kept min-height var(--header-h)=52 while siblings were overridden to narrower sizes; this cycle normalizes cart trigger to 44px.
issues.root_cause: Mixed component-level sizing plus inherited min-height created unequal button boxes.

issues.title: Icon sizes drift by breakpoint (16/18/20/22)
issues.evidence: Icon and hamburger dimensions vary heavily across narrow media queries.
issues.root_cause: Per-breakpoint hand-tuning without a locked tokenized scale.

issues.title: Critical CSS and main CSS use different horizontal rhythm for header inner
issues.evidence: header.php critical uses padding 1rem, main header CSS defaults to 1.5rem.
issues.root_cause: Dual style source without single mobile spacing contract.

issues.title: Desktop media rules mix 1024 and 1025 thresholds
Search panel behavior differs at tablet boundary from JS expectation
issues.evidence: CSS opens panel in 769-1023 flow while JS close/open logic uses <1025 threshold.
issues.root_cause: State authority split between body class and width branches.

issues.title: Cart count hidden on mobile <=600 (except empty state fallback)
issues.evidence: Before fix rule hid .mnsk7-header__cart-count and .count on <=600; this cycle keeps compact visible badge.
issues.root_cause: Space-saving decision creates CTA honesty/readability risk.

issues.title: Content top-spacing contract mixes 768 and header/promo variables
issues.evidence: 25-global-layout uses margin-top var(--header-h) for mobile and promo calc with 2.5rem fallback.
issues.root_cause: Multiple spacing authorities can drift under sticky/promo updates.

issues.title: Mega-menu parent first/second tap relies on class state with no explicit reopen reset for all branches
issues.evidence: is-open toggled on li; close flows differ between overlay closures.
issues.root_cause: Reopen path consistency not centrally normalized.

issues.title: Logo max-width compression can become too aggressive on 320 viewport
issues.evidence: max-width calc and icon density squeeze logo down to 80px at <=320.
issues.root_cause: Aggressive narrow-screen packing to preserve four actions in one row.
